THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, JOSEPHINE S.N DBA YOUNG FUNG COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEFANI, DAVE DBA MAINE IAC PLTFF WAS NOT PRESENT TO OFFER EVIDENCE; APPEAL GRANTED AND JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT.
